headline: Veralto Corp (NYSE:VLTO) Q1 2026 Tops EPS Estimates, Revenue Slightly Misses
summary: Veralto (VLTO) beat Q1 2026 EPS estimates at $1.07 but slightly missed revenue forecasts. Shares surged 6.3% after-hours on strong profitability and cost management.
